# hetzner_rdns (Data Source)

Use this data source to read a reverse DNS (PTR) record for an IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner_rdns" "example" {
  ip = "203.0.113.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address to look up.

### Read-Only

- `ptr` (String) PTR record value.
